• Interactive nuclear energy explainer with fission, fusion, and Cold War technology sections.
  • Features particle background system, scroll-triggered animations, and parallax effects.
  • Contains reactor visualization with fuel/control rods and magnetic confinement fusion demo.
  • Includes educational timeline and source references.
    // Intersection Observer for Reveal Animations
    // Dynamic DOM generation for reactor visuals
    // Scroll-triggered physics and parallax effects
    // Optimized particle system with canvas rendering

This comprehensive nuclear energy explainer features interactive visualizations of fission, fusion, and reactor technology. Built with modern web technologies including Tailwind CSS, it includes smooth scroll animations, a particle background system, and educational content about nuclear physics and history.
